instruction: Return a JSON object with fields: name (string), age (integer), city (string).
Return a JSON object representing a product with fields: product_id (string), price (number), in_stock (boolean), tags (array of strings).
Return a JSON object for a sensor reading: sensor_id (string), timestamp (string ISO8601), value (number), unit (string), anomaly (boolean).
Return a JSON object for a machine fault event: machine_id (string), fault_code (string), severity (one of: low, medium, high, critical), description (string), recommended_action (string).
Return a JSON object with fields: model_name (string), params_billion (number), quantization (string), tokens_per_second (number), peak_ram_mb (number).

Return a JSON object for a maintenance schedule entry: equipment_id (string), next_maintenance_date (string), maintenance_type (string), assigned_technician (string), estimated_duration_hours (number).
Return a JSON object for a benchmark result: run_id (string), model (string), quant (string), task (string), score (number between 0 and 1), latency_p95_ms (number).
Return a JSON object for a datacenter rack: rack_id (string), location (string), servers (array of objects, each with server_id and cpu_cores), total_power_kw (number).
Return a JSON object describing a Python package: name (string), version (string), dependencies (array of strings), license (string), python_requires (string).
Return a JSON object for a temperature alert: zone (string), current_temp_celsius (number), threshold_celsius (number), alert_level (string), timestamp (string).
Return a JSON object for a user profile: user_id (string), email (string), role (string), permissions (array of strings), last_login (string ISO8601).
Return a JSON object for a vibration analysis report: asset_id (string), frequency_hz (number), amplitude_mm_s (number), bearing_fault_detected (boolean), rms_velocity (number).
Return a JSON object for a model evaluation summary: model_id (string), tasks_completed (array of strings), average_score (number), hardware (string), duration_minutes (number).
Return a JSON object for a factory shift report: shift_id (string), start_time (string), end_time (string), units_produced (integer), defect_rate (number), operator_ids (array of strings).
Return a JSON object describing a network device: device_id (string), ip_address (string), mac_address (string), firmware_version (string), uptime_hours (number), online (boolean).

Return a JSON object for an anomaly detection result: detector_id (string), timestamp (string), anomaly_score (number between 0 and 1), is_anomaly (boolean), features (object with at least two numeric fields).
Return a JSON object for an API response: status (string, one of: success, error), data (object or null), error_message (string or null), request_id (string), latency_ms (number).

Return a JSON object for a pump health record: pump_id (string), flow_rate_lpm (number), pressure_bar (number), efficiency_percent (number), health_score (number between 0 and 100), warnings (array of strings).
Return a JSON object for a code review finding: file_path (string), line_number (integer), severity (one of: info, warning, error), rule_id (string), message (string), suggestion (string).

Return a JSON object for a training run metadata: experiment_id (string), model_architecture (string), dataset (string), epochs (integer), final_loss (number), best_accuracy (number), hyperparameters (object).
